1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
2.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
2.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

2.gl: stillness; adverbially, silently; abstractly quiet, trust
a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised

3.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
3.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

3.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
3.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

3.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
3.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

3.gl: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn

4.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
4.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
4.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

4.gl: to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel
4.kj: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation).

4.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
4.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.
fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
4.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

5.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
5.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

5.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
5.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
5.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

5.gl: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
5.kj: (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make

5.gl: to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
5.kj: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.

5.gl: good (as a noun), in the widest sense, especially goodness (superlative concretely, the best), beauty, gladness, welfare
5.kj: fair, gladness, good(-ness, thing, -s), joy, go well with.

5.gl: a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls)
5.dv: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense;

6.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
6.kj: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a

6.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
6.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

6.gl: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition)
6.kj: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.

6.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
6.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

6.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
6.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

7.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

7.gl: vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard
7.kj: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.
7.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

7.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
7.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
7.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

7.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

8.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
8.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

8.gl: a noise, tumult, crowd; also disquietude, wealth
8.kj: abundance, company, many, multitude, multiply, noise, riches, rumbling, sounding, store, tumult.

8.gl: properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words)
8.kj: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.

8.gl: something rolled, i.e. a heap of stone or dung (plural ruins), by analogy, a spring of water (plural waves)
uproar (as of rushing); by implication, destruction

8.dv: or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather;

9.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
9.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

9.gl: a going forth, i.e. (the act) an egress, or (the place) an exit; hence, a source or product; specifically, dawn, the rising of the sun (the East), exportation, utterance, a gate, a fountain, a mine, a meadow (as producin
9.kj: brought out, bud, that which came out, east, going forth, goings out, that which (thing that) is gone out, outgoing, proceeded out, spring, vein, (water-) course (springs).
9.dv: or מֹצָאxlit môtsâ corrected to môtsâʼ; from H3318 (יָצָא);

9.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
9.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

9.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
9.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

9.gl: a signal (literally or figuratively), as aflag, beacon, monument, omen, prodigy, evidence, etc.
9.dv: probably from H225 (אוּת) (in the sense of appearing);

10.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

10.gl: to visit (with friendly or hostile intent); by analogy, to oversee, muster, charge, care for, miss, deposit, etc.
10.kj: appoint, [idiom] at all, avenge, bestow, (appoint to have the, give a) charge, commit, count, deliver to keep, be empty, enjoin, go see, hurt, do judgment, lack, lay up, look, make

10.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
10.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

10.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
10.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
10.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

11.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
11.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

11.gl: to melt, i.e. literally (to soften, flow down, disappear), or figuratively (to fear, faint)
11.kj: consume, dissolve, (be) faint(-hearted), melt (away), make soft.

11.gl: to slake the thirst (occasionally of other appetites)
11.kj: bathe, make drunk, (take the) fill, satiate, (abundantly) satisfy, soak, water (abundantly).

11.gl: to sink, i.e. descend; causatively, to press or lead down
11.kj: be broken, (cause to) come down, enter, go down, press sore, settle, stick fast.

11.gl: a sprout (usually concrete), literal or figurative
11.kj: branch, bud, that which (where) grew (upon), spring(-ing).

11.dv: from an unused root meaning to accumulate;

12.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g
12.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

12.gl: a track (literally or figuratively); also a rampart (as circular)
12.dv: or feminine מַעְגָּלָה; from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל);

12.gl: a year (as a revolution of time)
the fat; abstractly fatness, i.e. (figuratively) abundance; specifically the (fatty) ashes of sacrifices
to encircle (for attack or protection); especially to crown (literally or figuratively)

13.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
13.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

13.gl: a revolution (of time, i.e. an age); also joy
13.kj: [idiom] exceedingly, gladness, [idiom] greatly, joy, rejoice(-ing), sort.

13.gl: to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.)
13.kj: be able to put on, be afraid, appointed, gird, restrain, [idiom] on every side.

13.dv: feminine from the same as H1387 (גֶּבַע);
